german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: Nearly half of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Technical Roles Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Technical PM roles, highlighting an imbalance in the product management landscape.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: Over half of the positions are filled by senior-level professionals, indicating a strong demand for experienced talent.

work_mode.title: Work Modes Reflect Diverse Preferences Among Employees
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of the workforce favors hybrid and onsite arrangements, indicating a need for flexible work options.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream
ai.subtitle: 43% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 40% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: PM demand spans multiple industries
industry.subtitle: Hiring is spread across industries with no single sector strongly dominant.
